text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City injured herself during training today.
Once I finish tending to the wound...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Trainer. Since it's nothing serious, let's go
back to training. I don't want to waste any time.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I should still be able to run a few laps before my
manager comes to pick me up, right?
choice_data_list: I think we should call it a day.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What? Why? This is nothing, plus you patched me
up already.
choice_data_list: If it gets worse, it'll affect your ability to race.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Look, we're already short on time! Fine—but we're not canceling our training tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I manage to calm her down, and she agrees to
take a rest at the infirmary until it's time for her
modeling job.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, good call. I'll have to concentrate better.
Can't let myself get distracted by thoughts of
work again...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Well, so long as I'm not being careless, I'll be fine.
A slight twist is nothing to worry abo—

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
No way... Another twist. When have I ever been
this clumsy?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City seems to have aggravated her injury. I
decide to have her take the rest of the day off.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what they're gonna ask me during the
interview later... Agh, no, snap out of it!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Modeling, and running. If I want to do both, I
need to keep them separate.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You did a good job patching me up, so I need to
make use of the rest of our time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Committed to her training, Gold City successfully
completes today's regimen as planned.
